data.body: Story B approved and created: a8e5-6876-dcde-4d3d under epic 9d50 (Pass-2 grounding hardening + finding hygiene), discovered_from bug 5e40. Three components, each pass-separation-clean: (1) absence-claim veto — two abstain-safe Pass-2 binaries + deterministic Pass-3 drop symmetric to the citation veto, f1fa 11:44 verdict as regression fixture; (2) DET content floor — fix P5/P6 emitters to name subjects + DET-scoped Pass-3 hygiene backstop; (3) operator-attested awareness — DET tag detection injected into severity_attributes, rubric vocabulary in E2/F1/E6, deterministic hard-override suppression, one coaching move. Comment-trail consultation explicitly excluded (self-refutation channel). Epic 9d50 now has 11 children.
